query: SELECT COUNT(*) as com_data FROM instrumentos WHERE dataInicio IS NOT NULL AND dataTermino IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as sem_data FROM instrumentos WHERE dataInicio IS NULL OR dataTermino IS NULL; SELECT id, numero, tipo, diretoria, dataInicio, dataTermino FROM instrumentos WHERE dataInicio IS NOT NULL AND dataTermino IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
